features.title: Zaim CSV visualization web app
features.notes: Vite+TS frontend, FastAPI+Lambda Web Adapter backend, Terraform+Terragrunt IaC, Cognito auth, DynamoDB, CloudFront

ecr.title: ECR repository as first-class Terraform/Terragrunt resource
ecr.notes: New ECR module + env config, Lambda module refactored to accept ecr_repository_arn variable, terraform-apply.yml updated with 3-stage all-deploy

frontend-deploy.title: Frontend deploy GitHub Actions workflow
frontend-deploy.notes: New .github/workflows/frontend-deploy.yml — OIDC auth, Node 20 + npm cache, Vite build with Cognito secrets, S3 sync + CloudFront invalidation

cloudfront-oac-iam.title: CloudFront OAC + Lambda migration
cloudfront-oac-iam.notes: Replaced X-Origin-Secret shared secret with CloudFront OAC SigV4 signing. Lambda Function URL: authorization_type=NONE (AWS_IAM deferred). JWT moved to X-Authorization header (OAC overwrites Authorization). Removed Secrets Manager dependency from Lambda.

cloudfront-lambda-403.title: Fix CloudFront -> Lambda Function URL 403 AccessDeniedException

cloudfront-lambda-public-access.title: Fix CloudFront -> Lambda Function URL 403 (public access)
cloudfront-lambda-public-access.notes: authorization_type=NONE + lambda:InvokeFunctionUrl + lambda:InvokeFunction (both) for principal=* required. AWS account requires both actions for public Function URL access. GET returns 422, POST returns 401 (FastAPI JWT validation reached). CloudFront Function URL was recreated during debugging; terraform apply updated origin URL automatically.

upload-decimal.title: Fix upload 500 — DynamoDB float TypeError
upload-decimal.notes: boto3 DynamoDB rejects Python float. Used Decimal(str(v)) explicit conversion in upload router. Removed json round-trip approach per review feedback.

bug-high.title: Fix BUG-01 (Cognito token expiry) and BUG-02 (Shift-JIS CSV mojibake)
bug-high.notes: BUG-01: forceRefresh:true in getIdToken(); 401 handler in api.ts calls signOut()+redirect. BUG-02: detectEncoding() helper probes first 4KB with TextDecoder fatal=true; passes encoding to PapaParse.

bug-medium.title: Fix BUG-03 (month-end date), BUG-04 (userId in client model), BUG-10 (Lambda wildcard principal)
bug-medium.notes: BUG-03: new Date(y,m,0).getDate() zero-day trick for correct last-day-of-month. BUG-04: removed userId from Transaction Pydantic model and TS interface; extra='ignore' added for safe rollout; userId injected post model_dump() from JWT. BUG-10: replaced principal='*' Lambda permissions with cloudfront.amazonaws.com + source_arn condition.

lambda-aws-iam-403.title: Fix Lambda 403 AccessDeniedException — align Function URL AuthType to AWS_IAM
lambda-aws-iam-403.notes: Root cause: CloudFront OAC signing_behavior=always with Function URL authorization_type=NONE caused 403. Fix: authorization_type=AWS_IAM on Function URL + function_url_auth_type=AWS_IAM on CloudFront permission. Applied via GitHub Actions (main) PR #32. Confirmed: /api/transactions returns HTTP 422 (FastAPI reached).

chart-controller.title: Fix Chart.js controller registration error
chart-controller.notes: Registered BarController/DoughnutController/LineController in frontend/src/charts.ts to resolve runtime error 'bar is not a registered controller' and restore chart rendering.
